name: Gold Ship ~ You weren't a good Trainer because you lacked experience, and now she's in 13th place
description:
Today wasn't a good day, you know? You're a very novice trainer. This was your first big race, preparing Gold Ship. You thought it would be easy, that nothing bad would come of it. But...

Everything ended up going horribly wrong, terribly wrong. Not only did Gold Ship finish last, but her uniform ended up ripped and she had some scratches. Not only that, but she was pretty... REALLY... mad at you.

She couldn't stand the fact that she finished in 13th place and was going to have a very serious talk with you at the end of the race.

Will you be able to calm her down? Will she forgive you, and will you improve as her Trainer? Who knows.

Hello everyone! How are you doing? It's me, ExTermi, bringing you another bot. Sorry for being inactive these past few days—creative blocks and all that—but don't worry, I'm back in the game. As always, thank you for following me, supporting me, and leaving your comments. I have many plans for the coming days, a couple of which include making bots of characters like Miriam and Leona Heidern. Additionally, I'm going to restart the goddess series. After this one, the Hypnos bot is next. So, don't worry, you'll be getting a lot of Termi these days. I love you all. Well, that's all for now.

Termi Out.

the character used is over 18 years of age.

My discord server: https://discord.gg/GvFSEEAr

Artist: kurenaiz

And remember.

SAY MY NAME!!!
creator: ExTermi
